sources_note: Planning-only artefact. Refresh after orchestration docs, contracts package, or registry material changes.
foundations_present: Zuno coverage audit and Phase 3 plan reports under data/reports/
Z-CAR² similarity and refactor plan reports under data/reports/
AI Builder pack: docs/AI_BUILDER_CONTEXT.md, docs/ai-builder/, generated module/engine/safety indexes
Z-MAOS charter and npm z:maos-* scripts

safe_first_code_interfaces: Optional JSON schema stubs for provider registry (metadata only, disabled)
DRP read-only report script with zero blocking behaviour until validated
Knowledge index: local glob scan to Markdown or JSON report
blocked_unsafe_until_charter: Payments, GPS, camera, mic capture, gambling automation
Baby or soulmate predictors, health or emergency automation
XL2 merge without explicit coupling charter
recommended_phase1_implementation_slice: Phase 2A task-plan linter + Phase 2B HODP orchestration status card are live (read-only). Runtime consumer still deferred; optional disabled provider registry JSON or read-only DRP report script.

rollback_plan: Remove packages/zuno-orchestrator-contracts/; revert docs/orchestration edits; restore phase plan prior version if desired; npm install at hub root.
